embeds.description:
Past Character Design Work for Morimens\.
为忘却前夜设计的阿特拉克/阿拉克涅可以公开了，细化由项目内完成本人只负责初期设计。感谢项目组指导。

content: Arachne concepts from her concept artist
Yay, they finally add option to change login background
I was complaining about it when I fill they survey, don't know if it's coincidence or not but it feels good
Btw does the argent journey on the new handbook is the Canon timeline for event? Cause I'm pretty sure vortice just came out a week ago
for now it's canon. and vortice is written to exist in the world of arc 1, so it tracks
I was confused because Salvador special ops is after   sorel, so I thought sorel event happen earlier than Salvador lorewise
woof finally finished ch5 for now, it looks good so far
But now with handbook I suppose that's the Canon timeline
oh no, the event listing outside the handbook is based on __release order__ not canon order
Yeah, I thought if it release first then canonically it should happen first? No?
its just how side story writing works in non open world gachas, they have the freedom to jump around the timeline to write whatever fits
Ok, I also wonder, does event happen in artificial domain really happen or not? Or does it just like to re experience awakened memories
I have an addiction problem for clicking spoilers
artificial domains are kinda like lucid dreams. they did happen, just that whatever happens inside doesnt affect reality
i mean the game itself spoils you when you open event store lol
thats a thing for real domains, artificial domains are called that because they're controllable (aka whoever handles it can ensure no one inside actually dies)

I meant like, if it's based on memory and dream, shouldn't the visitor(MC) cannot go to place that the awakened itself doesn't know about right? Or like know things that awakened themselves don't know about

for artificial domains, the space created is based on the memories and preception of everyone inside.
let's take 24 for example. if an artificial domain was made from her core, most of the space would be based on her memories, as you said. but the keeper can also manipulate the domain to a certain lesser degree based on their own memories.
as for knowledge, the visitor can retain all their knowledge from before entering the domain, but the awakener will not know of it unless informed (so just like normal situations)
Hmm, then why there's case like keeper suddenly have past memories from the person he possessed inside the domain? Doesn't it something that nobody know?
oh that's psyche deepdives. those are shared dreams (not domains) of an awakener's past shared with their linker
in deepdives the viewer assumes the identity of someone or something that was preset at that point in history, as well as their memories
Oh, I thought they are the same
(its only temporary and the identity and personality does wear off after waking up, but memories can be retained)
It's funi u say normal situations like dream hoping it lol
I was wondering cause how come when possessing those people the keeper can also access their memory, because I'm not sure that is something that the awakener themselves know
that has never been fully explained. i assume during deepdives it really does... plop keeper into a recreation of the past event
from what ive seen even the relevant awakener only knows of those indidents from their own pov instead of whoever keeper posseses
I was wondering something,  during ||the invasion of academy, inferno doll suddenly pop into plot, did i missed some plot in event or is there really no information about it before?||
ah, another victim of "the arc1 gdoll indicent"
Lmao, so that's really the case. I was wondering if i missed something but don't know for sure since I started pretty late
nah, welcome to the purgatory that is "cut arc1 storylines" and "rapidly planned arc2"
lorechat is always welcoming regulars and visitors
there was supposed to be an entire music-based arc that took place in an opera theater
featuring faint, tinct, hameln and other unreleased awakeners
and surprisingly it’s the theater Sorel likes to go
And ofc Sorel N Liz are in the pupper art teaser
we might see Liz in the story
Wow ahahahaha || i can’t believe we almost pulled a franz ferdinand ||
everything i hear about arc 2 story feels more and more wild

it'll take me 800 years to get there because i refuse to do so until i've finished all the arc 1 side stories first, but i'm honestly really curious about what i'll get since arc 2 has been more of the "throw stuff at the wall while we figure stuff out and/or work back in cut arc 1 content" storytelling from all i've seen
i do look forward to it!
guyz, did we just assassinate ||duke Franz Ferdinand|| in a2ch5?
amazingly ||that world is destined to have ww2 as well||
